## AI Usage Disclosure (if used)

Use one row per tool/model used while preparing this PR.

| bucket (`local` or `commercial`) | tool_or_model | approx_prompt_count | purpose |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| local | ollama/<model> | 0 | |
| commercial | copilot/gpt-5.3-codex | 0 | |

Notes:
- Prefer local models first (Ollama).
- Use commercial models only when local output is insufficient.
- Keep `approx_prompt_count` as a rough integer estimate.
